name: thinkers
description: v0.1.0 — Make sense of a confusing situation: what's actually happening, whether your own thinking is off, and what to do about it. It names the bias, fallacy, persuasion or manipulation tactic, or strategic move at work from a 243-pattern library, carefully (it separates real gaslighting from an ordinary disagreement before handing you a heavy label). Five skills: identify, explain, practice, decide, spar. Talks like a counselor, not a textbook. Standalone; runs on its own. Part of the Kenzie Creative marketplace.
